idea-plugin.name: SeedBase
idea-plugin.description:
Browse your SeedBase projects, generate realistic synthetic test data and pull SQL/CSV/JSON seeds straight into your project — without leaving the IDE.
  • SeedBase tool window: all projects with their generations at a glance
  • Generate Data: kick off a generation and get notified when it completes
  • Pull into Project: download a generation as SQL, CSV or JSON and open it in the editor
  • Secure login: browser-based authorization, token stored in the IDE's Password Safe
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0
  • Push Schema: turn workspace schema files into a SeedBase project schema — Django models.py (all apps combined automatically), Prisma and SQL, with a detect preview and confirmation before applying
0.1.0
  • Initial release: tool window with projects & generations, browser-based login (Password Safe), Generate Data, Pull SQL/CSV/JSON, Open in Browser
